title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: Junior Frontend Developer
Position Overview
We are seeking a motivated Junior Frontend Developer to join our development team.
The successful candidate will help build responsive, user-friendly web applications while collaborating closely with designers, backend developers, and product stakeholders.
This role is ideal for someone early in their career who is eager to grow their technical skills and contribute to real-world products.
Key Responsibilities
- Develop and maintain responsive web interfaces using modern frontend technologies.
- Implement UI designs and translate wireframes into functional web components.
- Write clean, maintainable, and reusable code following best practices.
- Collaborate with backend developers to integrate APIs and data services.
- Debug, test, and optimize applications for performance and usability.
- Ensure cross-browser compatibility and mobile responsiveness.
- Participate in code reviews and team discussions.
- Continuously learn and apply new frontend tools and frameworks.
Required Qualifications
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field (or equivalent experience).
- Knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript fundamentals.
- Experience with a modern frontend framework (e.g., React, Vue, or Angular).
- Understanding of responsive design principles.
- Familiarity with Git version control.
- Basic understanding of REST APIs.
Preferred Qualifications
- Experience with TypeScript.
- Familiarity with frontend build tools (Vite, Webpack, npm).
- Knowledge of UI/UX principles.
- Exposure to testing frameworks (Jest, Cypress, etc.).
- Experience working on personal or academic web projects.
Soft Skills
- Strong problem-solving abilities.
- Willingness to learn and receive feedback.
- Good communication and teamwork skills.
- Attention to detail.
What You’ll Gain
- Mentorship from experienced developers.
- Hands-on experience with modern web technologies.
- Opportunity to grow into a mid-level frontend developer role.
- Collaborative and supportive team environment.
